title: Dutch Herring Pickle Fritters
description: A crispy fritter recipe that combines the flavors of the Dutch herring and pickles. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flaked herring, chopped pickles, chopped fermented pickles, and shredded cheese.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into a hot skillet with about 1/2 inch of oil.
Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
